title: Complete Admin API and Blog Model Refinement
description: Implement all Admin API endpoints, expand Blog model (content_json/html, views, reading_time), integrate bleach for sanitization, and wire Meilisearch indexing.
acceptance_criteria: All stubs in /api/v1/admin/ are replaced with real logic
Blog model updated with content_json, content_html, views, reading_time_minutes
Bleach sanitization applied to HTML content before saving
Meilisearch indexing tasks are triggered on product/article updates
Alembic migration for new fields is applied
